rationale: The Iran deal signal is the most relevant new item for Poland — potential energy price relief — but no qualitative step beyond prior cycle; all other headlines are distant or irrelevant.

top_events.title: Iran signals Hormuz reopening tied to deal
top_events.summary: Iran confirms a ceasefire/deal would reopen Hormuz, sustaining hopes for lower energy prices in Europe. No new qualitative step beyond last cycle — momentum continues but no signing yet.

top_events.title: Russia-Ukraine war continues
top_events.summary: No qualitative change in the war on Poland's eastern border this cycle. Background threat persists but no new escalation or breakthrough.

top_events.title: Trump seeks 'off-ramp' in Iran deal
top_events.summary: US diplomatic push toward Iran deal could accelerate Hormuz reopening and ease European energy costs indirectly benefiting Poland. Still no signed agreement.
